description:
A modern file manager for Windows 10 and Windows 11.

OneCommander is a modern file manager for Windows 10 and Windows 11. Features include tabs, dual-pane browsers, columns navigation, built-in preview, a theming system, color tags, and much more. It is free for home use and has no ads.
NOTICE: Windows 11 update issue - if Explorer dialogs aren't showing for file operations started from OneCommander, enable Classic dialogs or switch to Taskmaster or TeraCopy as operation handler (Settings-Advanced) or uninstall faulty Windows update KB5060842 and/or KB5063060

🛠️ Option to use Classic file operation dialogs (Windows 7 style)
🐞 Taskmaster (0.11) improvements and bugfixes as alternative to Windows File Explorer dialogs
🐞 Fixed memory cleanup when using quickfilter (typing into files list to filter)
🐞 Fixed preview of zip and other archives postponing deletion/move
